docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ( NO COPY ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT SERVED DEC-16-2005, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, KENYA M PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION.
